checks.description: After reset release, clk_div must resolve to a defined logic level (0) within two clock cycles and remain stable until the first toggle.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div is 0 and does not change until a toggle is observed.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted (rst_n goes high).

checks.description: Observe that clk_div toggles at least once within 20 clock cycles after reset, indicating frequency division progress.
checks.pass_condition: At least one rising or falling edge of clk_div is observed within the window.
checks.trigger_condition: After clk_div has been observed stable following reset release.
